name: fluent
description: Fluent helps AI assistants remember meals and style context, with wellbeing reserved until it earns a public surface.

interface.shortDescription: Meals and style context; wellbeing reserved.
interface.longDescription: Fluent connects Codex to saved Meals and Style context while treating Wellbeing as a reserved public boundary.
defaultPrompt: Plan next week around my schedule and turn it into a grocery list I can actually shop from.
Plan my workouts for this week and keep them realistic.
Tell me if this clothing purchase is actually right for my wardrobe or just attractive in isolation.
